1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.rssfeed/blob/master/io-package.json).

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.rssfeed/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /widgets/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"
